title: taraxacum fontanicola
intro: Taraxacum fontanicola, also known as the fountain dandelion or water dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is used as a medicinal plant, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and laxative properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum fontanicola include its ability to alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, improve urine flow, and reduce swelling in the body. In herbal preparations, Taraxacum fontanicola is often dried and processed into teas, capsules, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
